title: AN ACT TO AMEND ITEM (R), PAGE 77, GROUP II, SUBPARAGRAPH (25), FOR THE PROVINCE OF LAGUNA, PARAGRAPHF, SECTION TWO OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 802 / 55 OG No. 35, 7291 (August 31, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2420, June 21, 1959 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND ITEM (

R

), PAGE 77, GROUP II, SUBPARAGRAPH (25), FOR THE PROVINCE OF LAGUNA, PARAGRAPH

F

, SECTION TWO OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item (

r

), page 77, group II, subparagraph (25), for the Province of Laguna, paragraph

f

, section two of Republic Act Numbered Fourteen hundred eleven is amended to read as follows:

"(

r

) Majayjay Slaughterhouse

Repair and improvement P3,000.00"

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, June 21, 1959.
